metadata.method_name: M4 Recall-Hole Router — Homograph Prospective Expansion (validate-or-demote) + M7 breadth
metadata.description: Reuses the iter-5 a-priori SAE firing-structure router VERBATIM (core.py) and applies the FROZEN recall-hole-alone rule (absorption iff parent recall-hole > tau_h_alone, fit ONLY on the 12 frozen derivation concepts) to a much larger truly-prospective set: ~93 homograph entities across 4 is-a hierarchies (cities/months/given-names/brands) + the 7 internal new-spelling letters. Each entity's regime is PREDICTED and LOGGED before its per-entity outcome (label-free CCRG unit vs best raw latent (a) / attribution pool (h) / non-SAE probe (d)) is measured; hit = (predicted == sign(auc_unit-auc_a)). M4 = per-predicted-regime prospective Wilson CIs + ROUTER_VALIDATED (CI excludes 0.5) / ROUTER_DEMOTED verdict. M7 = systematic absorption-breadth count over the homograph entities + named NEW suppressed-parent homographs. Reported as a screening heuristic with measured error, not a validated oracle.

baselines.a: best single raw SAE latent (highest train AUC, content-responsive) — the individual latent to beat
baselines.h: supervised SAE standardized diff-of-means attribution pool (top-k, AxBench/SCR-TPP proxy)
baselines.d: non-SAE standardized diff-of-means probe on the raw layer-12 residual (required non-SAE baseline)
baselines.unit: label-free CCRG K-track-lite: parent anchor + firing-disjoint hole-covering absorbers

homograph_build_metadata.description: FOUR-hierarchy (CITY / MONTH / GIVEN-NAME / BRAND) homograph/polysemy is-a feature-absorption testbed; a strict structural drop-in extension of the iter-1 non-spelling absorption testbed (art_t2uUbjSwpd3t). Each hierarchy ships content-flip pairs, surface-flip pairs, and a pile-uncopyrighted diagnostic corpus labelled by frozen, model-independent sub-context, PLUS a homograph_competitor matched-negative family (same surface token in its non-target sense). No SAE/model/activation computation.
homograph_build_metadata.BUILDING_BLOCK_NOTE: NEXT-ITERATION BUILDING BLOCK — this corpus is NOT consumed by this iteration's parallel experiments; it provides breadth of homograph/polysemy entity candidates so the persistent single-slice taxonomic critique can be answered next iteration with many suppressed-parent cases.
homograph_build_metadata.schema: exp_sel_data_out (flat metadata_* keys); see schema.json for the logical (nested) view

frozen_rule.definition_string: predict ABSORPTION-regime iff (parent recall-hole > 0.6577); else CO-FIRING-regime

reproduction_check.note: Frozen rule = whatever derivation yields; tiny drift from iter-5 is reported, not a hard failure. tau_h_alone is fit ONLY on the 12 derivation concepts BEFORE any prospective (homograph / spelling) outcome is measured (predict-then-measure integrity).

metadata.router_verdict_rationale: absorption-predicted homograph stratum Wilson95=[nan, nan] (n=0); homograph+spelling absorption stratum Wilson95=[0.03, 0.564] (n=6). No prospective CI excludes 0.5 -> the router is reported as an EXPLORATORY DIAGNOSTIC, not a validated a-priori predictor (honest negative).
counterexamples: numeric: firing-Jaccard=nan HIGH yet ground-truth=co_firing -> jaccard-alone MISLABELS it; the recall-hole gate (recall_hole=nan) routes it correctly.

taxonomic (aggregated): firing-Jaccard=nan LOW yet ground-truth=co_firing: the parent already fires on 0.96 of positives (recall_hole=nan) so there are no holes -> recall-hole gate correctly routes co_firing where jaccard-alone would mislabel absorption.
recall-hole≈1.0 OVER-predicts absorption on new spelling letters F,W (false-absorption misses) — re-confirmed here.
honest_notes: M4 VERDICT = ROUTER_DEMOTED. absorption-predicted homograph stratum Wilson95=[nan, nan] (n=0); homograph+spelling absorption stratum Wilson95=[0.03, 0.564] (n=6). No prospective CI excludes 0.5 -> the router is reported as an EXPLORATORY DIAGNOSTIC, not a validated a-priori predictor (honest negative).

PRIMARY rule = RECALL-HOLE-ALONE (predict absorption iff parent recall-hole > 0.658); fit ONLY on the 12 frozen DERIVATION concepts (balanced_acc=1.000, LOO=1.000). The homograph entities + the 7 internal spelling letters are the truly-PROSPECTIVE set: every entity's regime is PREDICTED and LOGGED ('[logged BEFORE outcome measurement]') before its per-entity outcome is measured.

GROUND-TRUTH regime PRIMARY = sign(auc_unit - auc_a): the label-free CCRG unit is built on the parent's recall HOLES, so a hit means grouping helps exactly where the recall-hole rule said it would. SECONDARY vs (h) the supervised attribution pool frequently beats the unit on GENERAL classification even in true absorption (the absorption advantage lives on absorbed-slice recall); (d) is the required non-SAE residual diff-of-means probe. (a)/(h)/(d) reported in every entity row.

M7 BREADTH: of 11 homograph entities with a stable recall-hole estimate (n_all>=30), 0 are absorption-structured (recall_hole > 0.5 AND firing_Jaccard < 0.1); 0 of those are inferential (n_diag>=150). This directly quantifies how narrow absorption is across the homograph entity space and answers the 'absorption is n=1-2' critique. NEW named suppressed-parent homographs (beyond Georgia/Jordan, which live in the taxonomic derivation set): none found

SANITY: the absorption-PREDICTED count (recall_hole>tau_h_alone~0.78) is a STRICTER gate than the absorption-STRUCTURED breadth flag (recall_hole>0.5), so #predicted-absorption <= #structured by construction; both are reported.
numeric: firing-Jaccard=nan HIGH yet ground-truth=co_firing -> jaccard-alone MISLABELS it; the recall-hole gate (recall_hole=nan) routes it correctly.

taxonomic (aggregated): firing-Jaccard=nan LOW yet ground-truth=co_firing: the parent already fires on 0.96 of positives (recall_hole=nan) so there are no holes -> recall-hole gate correctly routes co_firing where jaccard-alone would mislabel absorption.
recall-hole≈1.0 OVER-predicts absorption on new spelling letters F,W (false-absorption misses) — re-confirmed here.
